Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your HR system is secure, accessible, and connected to your payroll, government agencies, and banks. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA when handling employee NRICs, salaries, and medical data—this family enforces that compliance and prevents unauthorised access. It matters when your HR team works from home and needs mobile access, or when you integrate payroll with your accountant's system.

Core HR.narrative: This is the backbone of your HR system—a single, authoritative record of every employee's personal details, contracts, employment history, and documents. Singapore SMEs need this to onboard new staff smoothly, manage departures compliantly, and give employees a self-service portal to update their own information. It matters when you hire your first 10 staff and need to scale to 50 without losing track of who has signed what.

Time & Attendance.narrative: This family tracks when employees work, manages their leave requests, and calculates overtime and shift pay automatically. For retail, F&B, and logistics SMEs with shift workers, this is critical—it prevents disputes over hours worked and ensures you pay the right amount for night shifts or public holidays. It matters when you have 20+ staff across multiple shifts and can't manually track attendance in a spreadsheet.

Payroll & Statutory.narrative: This family calculates monthly pay, deducts CPF and income tax correctly, generates payslips, and files mandatory returns to CPF Board, IRAS, and MOM. Every Singapore employer must do this—getting it wrong costs penalties and employee trust. It matters the moment you hire your first employee; without it, you're manually calculating pay and risking compliance breaches.

Talent & Growth.narrative: This family helps you hire the right people, develop them through training and feedback, manage their compensation fairly, and recognise their contributions. Singapore SMEs competing for talent need to show a clear career path and fair pay—this family makes that visible and systematic. It matters when you want to reduce turnover, fill a critical role quickly, or run a structured performance review cycle.

Lifecycle & Analytics.narrative: This family gives you visibility into workforce trends—headcount forecasts, turnover rates, cost per hire, and reasons why people leave. Singapore SMEs often lose institutional knowledge when key staff depart; this family helps you predict and prevent that. It matters when you're planning next year's budget, investigating why your turnover is high, or preparing for a disciplinary case.
